understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level by using horizontal moves and clicks to navigate through breakable blocks, while avoiding spike tiles that end the run instantly.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically pulled the character vertically until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike, or reaching the goal. CLICK allowed removing breakable blocks (x) by specifying a target tile position, which could open new fall paths. UNDO reversed the previous action. Each level had 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts total. Falling onto a spike (`u`/`v`) caused immediate failure, and breakable blocks could be clicked to clear obstacles in the direction of gravity to progress toward the goal.
